headline.purpose: All page / sheet / modal / empty-state titles; 20px.

title.purpose: List-row headings, entry names, input text; 15px/500.

body.purpose: Base body and descriptions; 14px; cap prose at 65–75ch.

meta.purpose: Secondary body — notes, helpers, small text buttons/links; 13px.

label.purpose: Tracked-uppercase functional field labels & table headers only; 10px.

shadows.name: whisper
shadows.purpose: Resting lift on the login card and, optionally, primary interactive surfaces.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets and modals floating above the page, paired with a scrim.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default color/state transitions on buttons, nav, chips.

breakpoints.name: hand
breakpoints.purpose: The single hand-held column max-width; the app does not expand beyond this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid forest-green action; the confident, committed choice on a sheet or flow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3D6B4F; color: #fff; padding: 12px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; transition: background .15s ease, transform .15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2F5340; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D6B4F; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .6; cursor: default; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Low-emphasis / cancel action: hairline border, muted ink, no fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: none; color: #6E6A62; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: color .15s ease, border-color .15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #1C1A17; border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.16); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D6B4F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Canvas-fill field with a hairline border; focus turns the border forest green, no glow.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; } .ds-field-label { display: block; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .07em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6E6A62; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; background: #F5F1EB; color: #1C1A17; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; outline: none; transition: border-color .15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8f887e; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3D6B4F; }

components.name: Entry Card
components.description: Flat white record card with a hairline border; a location pill and severity dots ride along the row.
components.html:
HeadacheTemple, left

Dull, came on after lunch.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-card-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-main { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-card-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #1C1A17; } .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; background: #E3EFE8; color: #3D6B4F; } .ds-card-note { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; color: #6E6A62; margin-top: 7px; } .ds-dots { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-dots i { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-dots i.on { background: #C4752A; }

components.name: Severity Dots
components.description: Five dots encoding a 1–5 value by count filled AND color band (green 1–2, amber 3, red 4–5). Dual encoding is mandatory.
components.css: .ds-sev { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; } .ds-sev i { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-sev i.on { background: #B83A3A; }

components.name: Bottom Nav
components.description: Fixed hand-held tab bar; inactive faint ink, active label forest green, emphasized symptom action.
components.html: ◉Stats◉Today+Log
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; background: #fff; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); height: 64px; max-width: 430px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 3px; color: #B2ADA4; text-decoration: none; transition: color .15s ease; } .ds-nav-icon { font-size: 20px; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-item.active .ds-nav-label, .ds-nav-item.active .ds-nav-icon { color: #3D6B4F; } .ds-nav-item.symptom { flex: 1.3; background: #3D6B4F; color: #fff; border-top-left-radius: 14px; } .ds-nav-item.symptom .ds-nav-label { font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: Health Log is a scientist's personal notebook rendered for the phone: warm cream paper, hairline rules keeping order, and data captured in a form you can reason over months later. Calm but rigorous — reassuring enough to open every day, honest enough that a clinician can trust it cold. One forest green does all the work; amber and red enter only when the data turns serious. Lora warms the few headings; DM Sans carries every label, field, and number inside a fixed 430px hand-held column.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream paper (#F5F1EB), never a blue-white clinical surface.
One forest-green accent (#3D6B4F) carries actions, selection, and calm-severity.
Two voices: Lora serif for headings, DM Sans for all UI and data.
Flat by default; depth is earned, not sprinkled.
Meaning is always carried by more than color — shape, count, position, label.
A single 430px hand-held column; density serves the data, not the screen.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: A single forest green carries every affordance that means 'act' or 'selected.' Never decorative.

rules.name: The Categorical Set is Not the Palette
rules.body: Food-type dots draw from a separate 10-color categorical set. These are data encodings, not brand colors, and must never leak into chrome, buttons, or type.

rules.name: The Serif is a Guest
rules.body: Lora appears only in headings and rare intentional moments; never labels, data, numbers, or buttons.

rules.name: The Earned-Depth Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow must justify itself as an overlay or a direct response to interaction.

dos: Do keep the cream canvas (#F5F1EB) as the ground and one forest green (#3D6B4F) as the only working accent.
Do back every color-coded signal with a second cue — count, shape, icon, position, or label.
Do reserve Lora for headings and rare earned moments; run all labels, data, and numbers in DM Sans.
Do keep surfaces flat with hairline borders; add depth only for overlays or a genuine interaction response.
Do meet WCAG AA contrast including muted and placeholder text.
Do make it feel considered — 'not boring' is a requirement, not a nicety.
donts: Don't let it feel boring, generic, or forgettable.
Don't drift toward a cold, sterile clinical EMR look.
Don't rely on color as the only signal for severity, food type, or status.
Don't use the forest green decoratively.
Don't let categorical food-type colors leak into chrome, buttons, or type.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't nest cards, and don't add a tracked-uppercase eyebrow above every section.
